locations.name: 巴西

locations.name: 法屬圭亞那

locations.name: 圭亚那
locations.summary: 蓋亞那合作共和国（英語：Co-operative Republic of Guyana），通称圭亚那（英語：Guyana），位於南美洲北部，是南美洲一个以英語為官方語言的国家，也是英联邦成员國。東鄰蘇利南，南臨巴西，西鄰委内瑞拉，北鄰大西…

locations.name: 蘇利南

relations.subject: Caica parrot
relations.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in its range, as land is cleared for cattle ranching and soy production, facilitated by expansion of the road network." It is considered common in French Guiana but uncommon to scarce elsewhere; it does occur in "several large, strict protected areas"
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
